descriptionHtml:
Elan Impression 434 for sale 2005 | 4 cabins versions | Tax paid

 

If you are seeking a well-kept cruising yacht with a reputation for comfortable and safe sailing, the Elan Impression 434 for sale 2005 is well worth your consideration. This yacht stands out for its practicality and proven design, making it suitable both for coastal cruises and longer passages. The boat on offer is in good condition, with regular maintenance carried out and several recent upgrades. As a one-owner vessel, she demonstrates attentive care throughout.

Navigation and equipments:

  • Autopilot
  • VHF radio
  • Depth sounder (ECO)
  • Log
  • Tridata
  • Compass
  • Stereo
  • Plotter
  • Wind instrument

Other practical features include:

  • Furlex 300S furling system (2025)
  • Selden mast
  • Harken winches (2 x 40, 2 x 46)
  • Lazy bag and vang
  • Full-batten mainsail and genoa on Selden cars (fair condition)
  • Bow thruster (2024)
  • Tender (2024) with Honda 2.3hp outboard (2024)
  • Lofrans' Project 1000W electric windlass
  • Primary anchor: CQR 20kg, spare Danforth 20kg
  • 70m of 10mm chain
  • Mooring warps, life raft (needs revision)
  • Hot water boiler, autoclave, and external shower

Specifications:

  • Overall Length: 13.40m
  • Beam: 4.18m
  • Draft: 1.89m
  • Displacement: 10,900kg
  • Owners: 1
  • Registration: Registered (Imm. natante)

 

  • Hull Colour: White
  • Hull Material: GRP
  • Teak Cockpit: Yes
  • Bimini, Sprayhood: Yes
  • Cockpit Table: Yes
  • Recent upgrades: sprayhood/bimini, solar panels, side gates

 

  • Double Cabins: 3
  • Twin Cabin: 1
  • Dinette Berths: 2
  • Heads: 2
  • Shower Box: 1
  • Galley: 2-burner stove, oven, fridge

 

  • Engine: Volvo Penta D2-55, 55hp (2005)
  • Transmission: Shaft drive, twin wheel
  • Water Tanks: 850L (plastic)
  • Fuel Tanks: 270L
  • Bow Thruster: Yes (2024)
  • Generator 4kW
  • Navigation electronics: Yes
  • Winches: 4 Harken (2x40, 2x46)
  • Tender & Outboard: Yes (2024)
  • Anchor & Chain: CQR + Danforth, 70m chain
  • Safety: Life raft (needs revision)

Overall, this Elan Impression 434 for sale 2005 presents as a reliable, comfortable yacht in good condition, equipped for enjoyable cruising. For those wanting a sound, well-maintained vessel ready for new adventures, she is available now for viewing.
